/opt/loongson-gnu-toolchain-8.3-x86_64-loongarch64-linux-gnu-rc1.3-1/bin/loongarch64-linux-gnu-g++   -O3 -pthread -Wall   CMakeFiles/smartcar_demo.dir/main.cpp.o  -o smartcar_demo  -Wl,-rpath,/home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib ../libcommon_lib.a /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_photo.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_stitching.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_video.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_videoio.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_dnn.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_flann.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.10.0 /home/y6/桌面/opencv/build/lib/libopencv_core.so.4.10.0
